name: Zakir Hussain Rose Garden
description: Asia's largest rose garden spread across 30 acres, bursting with over 1,600 species of roses in a rainbow of colors, alongside medicinal herb sections and ornamental trees.
history: Established in 1967 and named after India's third President, Zakir Hussain. Hosts the famous annual Rose Festival every February-March.
famousFor: Asia's largest rose garden, 1, 600+ rose species
bestTime: February to March (Rose Festival), October to March
